title: ResumeBuddy Resume AST
description: Canonical structured resume model (v1). JSON is the interchange encoding; this schema is the normative shape.

schemaVersion.description: AST schema revision. Bump only for breaking structural changes.

sections.description: Ordered top-level resume sections (display and export order follow this array).

fullName.description: Candidate name as it should appear on the resume.

headline.description: Short professional headline or desired title line.

summary.description: Prose summary or objective; optional if represented as a summary section instead.

locale.description: BCP 47 language tag for locale-sensitive export (e.g. en-US).

profiles.description: Links such as LinkedIn, GitHub, portfolio.

id.description: Stable identifier for diffing, variants, and selective edits.

kind.description: Semantic section type for pipelines and ATS-friendly export.

entries.description: Items within the section; may be empty (e.g. placeholder section).

id.description: Stable identifier for this entry (role, degree, project, etc.).

title.description: Role title, degree name, project name, certification name, etc.

organization.description: Employer, school, issuer, or affiliated org.

location.description: Location associated with the entry, if applicable.

startDate.description: Start date; ISO 8601 full date (YYYY-MM-DD) or year-month (YYYY-MM) or year (YYYY).

endDate.description: End date in the same conventions as startDate, or null for present/ongoing when isCurrent is true.

isCurrent.description: True when the entry is ongoing (e.g. current role).

bullets.description: Achievement or detail lines; empty for entries that are single-line (e.g. a certification without sub-bullets).

id.description: Stable identifier for diffing and selective edits.
